allow: Bash(CLAUDECODE= node -e "const path = require\(''path''\); const pkg = path.dirname\(require.resolve\(''@anthropic-ai/claude-code/package.json''\)\); console.log\(pkg\);")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ast = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(''C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/AgentManager/setup.ps1'', [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\); if \($errors.Count -gt 0\) { $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Message } } else { Write-Host ''Parse OK - no errors'' }")
